task_objective: Keep running status bar visible until operation completes
tests_added: keeps a running status visible well past the old 10s timeout
publishes the final result when the operation completes before the ceiling
clears a previous timeout suppression when a new running status is published
design_decisions: Ceiling=930s chosen to match the backend 900s bound (user decision).
Stale-flag reset widened to all running statuses to fix the checking-suppression edge case.
results: Successfully updated tests to enforce new 930s ceiling, applied the logic in autoSyncStatusSurface, updated the spec, and verified all tests pass.
